title: Calpicarpum mianum
taxonomy: Calpicarpum mianum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and is known for its unique characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Calpicarpum mianum places it within the order Gentianales. This classification is based on the plant's morphological and anatomical features, as well as its phylogenetic relationships with other plant species. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships of Calpicarpum mianum.

Its extracts have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
